use_cases: Rotating hero section taglines with smooth fade, slide, or blur transitions
Displaying cycling feature highlights on SaaS landing pages
Animated status messages or labels in dashboards
Marketing copy with dynamic word-by-word text reveals
Developer tool landing pages with rotating descriptive keywords
ai_summary: A Framer Motion-based text animation component that cycles through an array of words with five distinct animation modes (slide, fade, blur, flip, drop). Features customizable timing intervals and CSS className props for styling flexibility. The flip mode applies 3D perspective for a volumetric text rotation effect. Ideal for hero sections, marketing pages, and anywhere dynamic rotating text is needed.
